evaluation_design.population_definition: All critical and high findings emitted by the selected v1.12.0 bounded URL audits of the four authorized properties, plus four predeclared negative-control cases on the Nebula Components homepage.
evaluation_design.selection_method: Complete adjudication of emitted critical and high findings; negative controls selected before metric evaluation from deterministic HTML-page eligibility detectors.
inclusion_criteria: Every critical or high finding emitted by the selected acceptance run for each property.
Four deterministic negative-control cases on an observed HTTP 200 HTML homepage.
exclusion_criteria: Medium and low findings were not adjudicated in this initial precision sample.
Semantic findings were excluded because two independent reviewers were not available.
Sitemap URLs beyond the 50-page crawl ceiling were excluded from accuracy metrics.
extrapolation_limits: Metrics apply only to the disclosed cases, properties, detector version, and collection window.
The sample does not estimate precision for medium or low findings or quantify unknown false negatives.
Owner adjudication is not independent validation.

detector_precision.population: Adjudicated detector cases with detected outcomes.
confidence_limitations: Precision applies only to the disclosed expected-case population.

discovered_false_negative_rate.population: Adjudicated cases expected to produce a detection.
confidence_limitations: Unknown false negatives are not quantified; only four predeclared negative controls were evaluated.
The 50-page URL-audit ceiling prevented complete sitemap adjudication on mikeholownych.com.

false_positive_rate.population: Adjudicated cases expected not to produce a detection.
confidence_limitations: Rate applies only to represented non-detection cases.

reviewer_exact_agreement.population: Semantic reviews with at least two verdicts.
exclusions: Reviews with fewer than two verdicts.
confidence_limitations: Exact agreement does not establish reviewer correctness.

adjudication_rate.population: Semantic reviews with at least two verdicts.
exclusions: Reviews with fewer than two verdicts.
confidence_limitations: Adjudication rate describes workflow, not semantic accuracy.
Runtime depends on disclosed execution environments.
Nearest-rank p95 is unstable for small populations.
Peak memory is the maximum owner-reported execution value.
Storage excludes unavailable or undisclosed evidence.
Reproducibility is bounded by each run receipt and declared exclusions.
Incomplete status depends on declared unavailable evidence.

remediation_verification_success.population: Remediation verifications with a completed verdict.
confidence_limitations: Verification does not establish external outcome causation.

unknown_false_negatives.reason: Cases absent from the disclosed and adjudicated expected-detection population cannot be counted.

false_negative_discovery_limitations: Unknown false negatives are not quantified; only four predeclared negative controls were evaluated.
The 50-page URL-audit ceiling prevented complete sitemap adjudication on mikeholownych.com.
causal_limitations: No property intervention was performed, so this corpus establishes no causal effect on search, citation, traffic, or conversion outcomes.
limitations: All collection and adjudication were owner-controlled and are not independent attestation.
Fingerprint equality was not observed across repeated live runs even though declared comparability dimensions were stable.
The corpus intentionally preserves detector applicability defects and incomplete observations rather than correcting the historical v1.12.0 cohort.
